description: Flickr is an online photo hosting and sharing service where people upload, organize, and browse photographs. It also provides a public developer API for accessing Flickr data and acting on behalf of Flickr users with OAuth.
summary: Flickr exposes one HTTP API surface at `https://api.flickr.com/services`, documented on flickr.com; it uses a developer-issued Flickr app key, either directly as `api_key` for public method calls or as the OAuth 1.0a consumer key for signed user-authorized calls. No Flickr-hosted GraphQL API, MCP server, or official CLI was found.
